name: Balsamico Chicken with Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. If the fricasseed chicken is frozen, defrost it.
2. Arrange the chicken pieces in an oven-proof casserole or Dutch oven.
3. Combine 3 tablespoons of tomato paste, 1/2 cup of low-sodium chicken broth, and 1/2 cup of Balsamic vinegar in a small bowl.
4. Add the combined sauce to the chicken pieces in the casserole or Dutch oven.
5. Add the pitted green olives (drained) to the mixture.
6. Cover and place the dish in an oven preheated to 375°F.
7. Bake for 20 minutes.
8. In a small saucepan over medium heat, cook the fricassee sauce until it thickens enough to coat a wooden spoon, about 5-to-10 minutes.
9. Uncover the casserole and strain the sauce over the chicken pieces.
10. Continue baking, uncovered, for another 5 minutes.
11. Serve the chicken and sauce in a serving bowl or on a deep serving platter, sprinkled with chopped fresh parsley.
